title: Basirhat Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Basirhat with a Z-Score of +4.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Basirhat are characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an Umidita of 77%.
The heat wave is expected to continue, with a CDD of 13.5 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
The Vento of 17.4 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief from the heat, making the situation critical.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
